data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design focuses on minimizing the distance for interactive elements to optimize user engagement.
data.technical_spec: Predictive search and related content features.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Limits the menu options displayed at one time to reduce information overload.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation menu with categories and recommendations.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits content chunks to seven or fewer on screens to enhance memory retention.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design consistency with other platforms enhances user familiarity and comfort.
data.technical_spec: Standardized UI components across Google platforms.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Emphasizes visually appealing design to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes and thematic designs.
